Package org.c02e.jpgpj

Class EncryptionDetails

java.lang.Object
org.c02e.jpgpj.EncryptionDetails
public class EncryptionDetails extends Object
Encryption parameters detected or applied to a message.
Since:
2.1.0

      public static final String PBE_ENCRYPTED_DATA_KEY_DATA_FIELD
